title: God Chapter, A. D. 1990: Riko
overview: A series of murders is taking place around the world, and suddenly, dragons begin to appear in the skies. It is believed that the dragons are responsible for the murders, so the Japan Self-Defense Forces begin shooting them down.

title: Devil Chapter, R. C. 297: Rulishia
overview: A 15-year-old girl named Rulishia comes to Carmine's tower and steals his horn, becoming her master.
